policy.expansion_policy: new default commands or public release posture require an explicit ADR
policy.release_posture: private-scaffold; no publish lane is active

surfaces.name: oh-my-antigrav
surfaces.rationale: Canonical local CLI entrypoint for the compact scaffold.
surfaces.validator: npm run inventory:validate && npm run smoke:pack

surfaces.name: oag
surfaces.rationale: Short alias for users who already know the canonical command; not part of the primary narrative.
surfaces.validator: npm run inventory:validate && npm run smoke:pack

surfaces.name: help
surfaces.rationale: Shows the complete compact command surface before use.
surfaces.validator: npm run cli:help && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: version
surfaces.rationale: Confirms the private scaffold version without requiring local state.
surfaces.validator: npm run cli:version && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: status
surfaces.rationale: Machine-readable readiness contract for local-only/private/no-telemetry posture.
surfaces.validator: npm run cli:status && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: init
surfaces.rationale: Creates the local home required for routine use.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern init && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: doctor
surfaces.rationale: Verifies install health and local-only state before deeper use.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern doctor && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: config
surfaces.rationale: Mutable local configuration is supported after first-run setup; guarded keys preserve private/no-telemetry/no-publish guarantees.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern config && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: skills
surfaces.rationale: Displays the four-stage default loop without exposing a broad skill zoo.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern skills && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: loop
surfaces.rationale: Starts the compact routine session over deep-interview -> ralplan -> team -> ultragoal.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern loop && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: session
surfaces.rationale: Session inspection and clearing support ongoing local use after the first loop has been created.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern session && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: deep-interview
surfaces.rationale: First stage of the canonical local loop; requirements before build.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern skills && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: ralplan
surfaces.rationale: Second stage of the canonical local loop; consensus plan before execution.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern skills && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: team
surfaces.rationale: Third stage of the canonical local loop; bounded parallel execution.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern skills && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: ultragoal
surfaces.rationale: Fourth stage of the canonical local loop; durable completion ledger.
surfaces.validator: npm test -- --test-name-pattern skills && npm run inventory:validate

surfaces.name: release-readiness
surfaces.rationale: Maintainer evidence record for status, pack smoke, and private posture; not marketed as a runtime feature.
surfaces.validator: npm run inventory:validate && npm run verify
